step_rationale: von Willebrand factor receptor; platelet adhesion and shear-dependent activation anchor.
mechanism: GPIb mediates platelet tethering to exposed von Willebrand factor at the site of endothelial rupture or erosion, initiating platelet adhesion and activation.
